RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_WEIRD_E: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Trouble Maker[/card] to your hand. When you enter an Event room, gain [gold]9[/gold] gold. Each consecutive Event room doubles this gold gain. Whenever you trigger an Event card, gain [blue]3[/blue] [power]Starlight[/power]. [card]Trouble Maker[/card] is excluded.
It always finds the perfect beat for the worst possible idea.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_VARIANT_PERSON: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Anomaly Maker[/card] to your hand. When you enter an Event room, gain [gold]9[/gold] gold. Each consecutive Event room doubles this gold gain. Whenever you trigger an [gold]Anomaly Event[/gold] card, gain [blue]3[/blue] [power]Starlight[/power]. [card]Anomaly Maker[/card] is excluded.
It does not just parse anomalies. It creates them.

At combat start, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Grant Spark+[/card] to your hand. Whenever you accumulate [blue]10[/blue] cards played, at the start of your next turn draw [blue]1[/blue] extra card and gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.

Every [blue]5[/blue]th turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Shatter Star[/card] to your hand.
Whenever you play an Attack card that costs at least [blue]1[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Charge[/gold].
Every [blue]7[/blue] [gold]Charge[/gold], all players gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Divine Son[/power] and [blue]1[/blue] [power]Divine Throne[/power].
At turn end, if you have at least [blue]21[/blue] [gold]Charge[/gold] and combat has not ended, consume all [gold]Charge[/gold], gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}, and attempt to take an extra turn.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_JEWELRY_NIGHT_:
If you have [gold][Variant: Sara][/gold], that relic's cooldown cap is reduced by [blue]2[/blue].
If you do not have [gold][Variant: Sara][/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] extra turn every [blue]9[/blue] of your own turns; this progress carries across combats.
Night clings to the skin and keeps one more turn in reserve.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PVZ_SIMPLE_NUT:
Whenever you accumulate [blue]80[/blue] unblocked damage taken across the run, add [blue]1[/blue] [relic]Hyper Temporal Nut[/relic] to the next victorious combat reward.
This can trigger only once per run.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PVZ_HYPER_TEMP:
The first time each run you would die, return to your HP from up to [blue]3[/blue] of your own turns ago.
If no [blue]3[/blue]-turn record exists, use [blue]2[/blue], then [blue]1[/blue].
Only HP is restored.
A harder shell remembers where your timeline used to be.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PVZ_ULTIMATE_H:
You cannot lose more than [blue]20%[/blue] of your Max HP in a single turn.
Whenever you accumulate [blue]30%[/blue] of your Max HP as unblocked damage in a combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Intangible[/power] at the start of your next turn.
You have a [blue]30%[/blue] chance to negate enemy Attack damage; whenever this triggers, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Half Life Heal[/power] and [blue]2[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
If you avoid all unblocked damage for [blue]15[/blue] of your own turns in a row, heal to full HP.
At turn start, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Artifact[/power].
When four timelines melt together, even causality starts blocking for you.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_VARIANT_PERSON:
Every [blue]5[/blue]th turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Divine Punishment[/card] to your hand.
At combat start, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Divine Son[/power].
At the start of turns whose number is a multiple of [blue]10 - your current Divine Son stacks[/blue], all players gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} and [blue]1[/blue] [power]Divine Son[/power]. This interval cannot go below [blue]1[/blue].

Every [blue]5[/blue]th turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Precision Obstacle Clearance[/card] to your hand.
At combat start, first gain Wings from your opening [power]Divine Son[/power], then all players gain [blue]Block[/blue] equal to [blue]7.7%[/blue] of your Max HP, increased by [blue]15%[/blue] per Wing.
Whenever you apply [poison]Poison[/poison] or Doom, every [blue]10[/blue] points applied adds [blue]3[/blue] more of that same effect.

Every [blue]5[/blue]th turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Punitive Judgment[/card] to your hand.
Your Attack cards deal an extra [blue]7.5%[/blue] damage plus [blue]4%[/blue] per total [power]Blazing Solar Burn[/power] stack on all enemies, up to [blue]47.5%[/blue].

Every [blue]5[/blue]th turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Innocent Wish[/card] to your hand.
If more than [blue]1[/blue] enemy is alive, your Attack cards deal an extra [blue]15%[/blue] damage times the current number of living enemies.
At the start of your turn, flip a coin. On heads, the first qualifying single-target Attack card you use this turn passes [blue]100%[/blue] of its actual damage on the main target to up to [blue]2[/blue] random other enemies.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSONALITY_DE: [Persona Derivative: Divine Throne]
Displays your current [gold]Charge[/gold].
To sit on the throne, first you must count what sustains it.
[Persona Derivative: Book of Heaven]

Enhances the whole team's [power]Divine Son[/power], using the highest threshold unlocked by any holder.
At [blue]4[/blue] stacks, Skill cards gain [blue]+1[/blue] Block. At [blue]6[/blue], Max Energy +[blue]1[/blue]. At [blue]7[/blue], Attack cards deal [blue]+1[/blue] damage. At [blue]10[/blue], Max Energy +[blue]1[/blue] again.
One book records them all. One book empowers them all.
[Persona Derivative: Glitch Robot]

Tracks and displays your Wings for this combat.
At combat start, gain [blue]2/4/6[/blue] [power]Divine Son[/power] based on act.
Whenever you gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Divine Son[/power], gain [blue]1[/blue] Wing.
If a single instance of unblocked HP loss meets or exceeds the current threshold, negate that damage and increase the threshold by [blue]47.4%[/blue]. The threshold starts at [blue]70[/blue] each combat.
It is not broken. It is writing fault tolerance into the wings.
[Persona Derivative: Dawn and Dusk Afterglow]

At combat start, and at the start of every [blue]5[/blue]th turn, apply [power]Rage of Fire[/power] to all enemies.
When you die, each teammate draws [blue]2[/blue] cards and gains {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}.
Sunrise and sunset both leave embers behind.
[Persona Derivative: Abyss Whisper]

If this is a Boss combat, at combat start you immediately gain [blue]4[/blue] [power]Whisper[/power].
At the end of each side's turn, every living unit on that acting side gains [blue]1[/blue] [power]Whisper[/power].
The abyss does not answer. It only keeps whispering louder.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_GUNSMIT:
Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Weakness Analysis[/card] to your hand.
Your Attack cards deal extra damage equal to your current [power]Weakness Insight[/power] stacks × [blue]2[/blue].
Whenever your [power]Dodge Stance[/power] actually reduces a hit to [blue]0[/blue], or your [power]Counter[/power] successfully deals retaliation damage, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Weakness Insight[/power], up to [blue]4[/blue] stacks, and lose [blue]1[/blue] stack at the end of each of your turns.
Spotting the flaw should happen before the shot.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSONALITY_DE: [Persona Derivative: Mysterious Dodging Man]

This relic displays its remaining counter, which starts at [blue]2[/blue], and can trigger only while that counter is [blue]0[/blue].
At turn start, reduce the counter by [blue]1[/blue] if it is above [blue]0[/blue].
At turn start, if the counter is [blue]0[/blue], randomly apply [blue]1[/blue] [power]Exposed Flaw[/power] to [blue]1[/blue] enemy, then reset the counter to [blue]2[/blue].
He never explains the dodge. He just leaves the opening behind.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_SAMURAI: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Famous Blade[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. Whenever an Attack card enters your hand, if its current cost is above [blue]3[/blue], its cost becomes [blue]3[/blue] while it remains in your hand this time; if it is already [blue]3[/blue] or less, do nothing. The first time each turn you attack an enemy, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [power]Sword Aura[/power]. The first [blue]2[/blue] stacks each make your attacks deal [blue]1[/blue] extra damage. The [blue]3[/blue]rd stack makes your attacks deal [blue]2[/blue] extra damage. Maximum [blue]3[/blue] stacks.
A single slash settles the stance. The third slash settles the battle.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_SLIME_L: Lose [blue]10[/blue] Max HP. When taking damage, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [power]Half Life Heal[/power], apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [power]Adherent Mucus[/power] to the damage source, and reduce this effect's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Healing Slime[/card] to your hand.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_BIONIC_: Gain [gold]Steps[/gold] when entering rooms. At combat start, lose [blue]1[/blue] Strength and [blue]1[/blue] Dexterity. Every [blue]13[/blue] steps gained grants [blue]1[/blue] Strength/Dexterity (alternating). Lose combat-gained Strength/Dexterity after combat ends.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_PROPRIE: When entering a shop, gain gold equal to [blue]10[/blue] times the number of shops you have entered this run. While any player has this relic, every player's shop cards, potions, relics, and card removal service each have a [blue]3[/blue]% chance to cost only [blue]30[/blue]% of their normal price. This chance increases by [blue]3[/blue]% each time you pass through a shop. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn. Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, trigger this relic's combat effect.
Business is business. Bargains are personal.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_MOUSY_L: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Mousy Save Me[/card] to your hand. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
A tiny rescue can still change the whole fight.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_BLUE_WH: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Weak Imprint[/card] to your hand. Defeating an enemy with [power]Weak Imprint[/power] gives you [blue]3[/blue] Gold. At turn start, reroll your [power]Node[/power] to a random value from [blue]1[/blue] to [blue]10[/blue]. If the result is [blue]6[/blue], gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold]. If combat ends exactly on turn [blue]6[/blue], gain [blue]6[/blue] Gold. Each later repeat adds [blue]2[/blue] more Gold to that reward. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
The future has already been decided!
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_MASCOT_: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Product Restocking[/card] to your hand. Whenever [card]Product Restocking[/card] discards a card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold]. Every time [card]Product Restocking[/card] has drawn a cumulative total of [blue]25[/blue] cards, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] token relics you do not currently own, gain that relic's temporary combat ability, and record it in [relic]Token Memory[/relic]. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
A full shelf is nice. A refilled hand is better.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_OASIS_Q: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Royal Prerogative[/card] to your hand. Deal [blue]1[/blue] extra damage for each [gold]Temporary[/gold] card in your hand, up to [blue]3[/blue]. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
What stays, what goes, and what shines all answer to the queen.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_INK_SHA: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Shadow Fusion[/card] to your hand. At turn start, apply [blue]1[/blue] [power]Twin Shadows[/power] to a random enemy. Whenever you play an Attack card that costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} to {energyPrefix:energyIcons(3)} targeting an enemy, apply [blue]1[/blue] [power]Twin Shadows[/power] to that target, up to your current [power]Shadow Quota[/power] limit each turn. Entering an Elite room gives you [blue]1[/blue] [power]Hunter's Feast[/power]. Entering a Boss room gives you [blue]3[/blue] [power]Hunter's Feast[/power]. At the end of that combat, each stack of [power]Hunter's Feast[/power] permanently increases your [power]Shadow Quota[/power] limit by [blue]1[/blue]. Combat end also reduces this relic's cooldown by [blue]1[/blue] turn.
A small shadow is still enough to leave a mark.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSONALITY_DE: [Persona Derivative: Wealth]
Every [blue]2[/blue] rooms, gain Gold equal to this relic's counter. [card]Transfer[/card] increases that counter by [blue]1[/blue]. This counter has no cap.

Less in hand. More from orbit.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_JILL_ST: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Mixed Cocktails[/card] to your hand. RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_SHADOW_:
Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Powerful Pity[/card] to your hand.
Whenever you cause any player to gain or draw a card, you and that player each gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
Whenever you gain [gold]StarLight[/gold], gain [power]Money Power[/power].
At combat start, for every [blue]13[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold] you have, gain [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] and [blue]1[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green].
The strong may show mercy. The shadow only remembers the price.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSONALITY_DE: [Persona Derivative: Scion's Unpaid Grace]

At the start of the first combat of each act, all players gain [blue]1[/blue] [card]Royalties[/card].
After you play [card]Powerful Pity[/card], gain [blue]1[/blue] [card]Wish[/card].
Once the young master's favor lands on you, it tends to keep arriving with interest.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_POISONE:
Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Concealing Operation[/card] to your hand.
[card]Trouble Maker[/card] temporarily includes the [gold]Concealing Investigation[/gold] event series in its pool, but [card]Deus Ex Machina[/card] never offers them.
Your Attack cards deal [blue]3[/blue] extra damage to enemies that already have [power]Mark[/power].
When a target with [power]Investigation Target[/power] is killed, it advances [gold]Investigation Progress[/gold] and triggers the matching-stage [gold]Concealing Investigation[/gold] event.
The apple is poisoned. So is the trail it leaves behind.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_MIDNIGH:
Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Unstoppable[/card] to your hand.
Whenever you kill an enemy while you have [power]Ready to Strike[/power], reduce this relic's cooldown by [blue]2[/blue].
A single flash buys the whole turn.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_DOROTHY:
Every [blue]2[/blue]nd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]True Me[/card] to your hand.
Whenever you heal, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Warm[/power]. Each stack grants [blue]1[/blue] temporary [green]Dexterity[/green], up to [blue]5[/blue].
At the start of each turn, if your [power]Node[/power] matches the ones digit of the current player's NetId-sorted seat index, both of you heal [blue]1[/blue] HP and you steal [blue]1[/blue] coin from that target.
The node pulses first. The heart follows.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_CYBER_K:
Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Remote Intrusion[/card] to your hand.
At turn start, if your [power]Node[/power] is above [blue]3[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red] and [blue]1[/blue] temporary [green]Dexterity[/green], then move [blue]1[/blue] Attack card from your draw pile to your hand. Reduce its cost by [blue]1[/blue], or by [blue]2[/blue] if it costs more than [blue]3[/blue]; X-cost cards are unchanged. If none is in the draw pile, take one from the discard pile instead.
After the first Attack card you play each turn, discard the leftmost Attack card in your hand and upgrade it for this combat. If you have no Attack card in hand, instead upgrade a random Attack card for this combat. If no upgradable Attack remains, upgrade a random upgradable card instead.
A firewall is only polite decoration once the cat already owns the network.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_VAMPIRE:
Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]One Little Sip[/card] to your hand.
When your HP is below [blue]50[/blue]%, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [power]Cute Is Justice[/power]; below [blue]25[/blue]%, gain [blue]1[/blue] more; below [blue]15[/blue]%, gain [blue]1[/blue] more.
When the body weakens, cuteness steps in as force.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_SOCIAL_: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Iron Virgin[/card] to your hand. At the start of each turn, apply [blue]1[/blue] [power]Boundary Reinforcement[/power].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_DIE:
If you end combat exactly on turn [blue]4[/blue], gain [blue]4[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold] and {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)} at the start of your next combat.
After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have. This effect no longer triggers once the full dice set is complete.

If you end combat exactly on turn [blue]6[/blue], gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold] and draw [blue]3[/blue] extra cards at the start of your next combat.
After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have. This effect no longer triggers once the full dice set is complete.
A simple roll with a tidy payout.

If you end combat exactly on turn [blue]8[/blue], gain [blue]8[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold] and deal [blue]5[/blue] damage to all enemies at the start of your next combat.
After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have. This effect no longer triggers once the full dice set is complete.

If you end combat exactly on turn [blue]10[/blue], gain [blue]10[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold] and [blue]7[/blue] Block at the start of your next combat.
After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have. This effect no longer triggers once the full dice set is complete.

If you end combat exactly on turn [blue]12[/blue], gain [blue]12[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold] and heal [blue]9[/blue] HP at the start of your next combat.
After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have. This effect no longer triggers once the full dice set is complete.

If you end combat exactly on turn [blue]20[/blue], gain [blue]20[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold] and all start-of-next-combat effects from the other dice at the start of your next combat.
After this relic triggers [blue]3[/blue] times, obtain [blue]1[/blue] die relic you do not have. This effect no longer triggers once the full dice set is complete.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_BAN: Gain [blue]14[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold]. If you do not have [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold], obtain it first, then add the stacks.
Not much at once. Plenty if you keep going.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_MEM: At the start of your [blue]3[/blue]rd, [blue]6[/blue]th, [blue]9[/blue]th, and later turns, draw [blue]1[/blue] extra card.
Even a standard membership looks better with a proper introduction.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_ETERNAL_: · No set effect is currently active.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_JEWELRY_MINIAT: It does not shrink the sun. It folds its afterheat small enough to hold.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_JEWELRY_SOLAR_: When the daywheel remains aloft, even its edge-light becomes something to lend.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_JEWELRY_ECHO_O: It is not that the echo is louder. It is that you finally heard the sun answer twice.

At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] Block.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_PIG: Bank the effort first. Cash out the sparkle later.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_SAN: A simple bite with surprisingly lasting mileage.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_BAN: Gain [blue]14[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold]. At combat start, all players gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
One swipe, and everyone glows a little brighter.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_EXP:

At end of turn, if you have fewer than [blue]6[/blue] cards in hand, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Orbital Railgun[/gold] next turn.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_MEM: At the start of your [blue]3[/blue]rd, [blue]6[/blue]th, [blue]9[/blue]th, and later turns, draw [blue]2[/blue] extra cards and gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_MOT:
At combat start, gain [blue]2[/blue] stacks of [gold]Phantom Reverse Scales[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green].
At the start of each turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] Block.
Premium protection makes every line feel cleaner.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_STA: Gain [blue]15[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold]. If you have at least [blue]40[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold] and at least [blue]100[/blue] Gold, the first time each turn you deal damage, spend [blue]15[/blue] Gold and deal bonus damage to that target equal to [blue]10[/blue]% of your current Gold. If that bonus damage kills the target, gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
The heavier the purse, the harder the swing.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_B: Gain [blue]28[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold]. If you do not have [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold], obtain it first, then add the stacks.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_M: At the start of your [blue]3[/blue]rd, [blue]6[/blue]th, [blue]9[/blue]th, and later turns, draw [blue]2[/blue] extra cards.
A stronger endorsement makes the benefits arrive faster.

At combat start, gain [blue]2[/blue] stacks of [gold]Phantom Reverse Scales[/gold].
At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] Block.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_S: Gain [blue]15[/blue] Max HP. At the start of each turn, if your current HP is below [blue]50[/blue]% of your Max HP, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Counter[/gold].
Well fed, well braced, and ready to bite back.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_A: When your HP is below [blue]50[/blue]%, gain [blue]1[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. When it is below [blue]25[/blue]%, gain [blue]3[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red] instead.

Whenever you kill an enemy, heal [blue]4[/blue] HP.
This relic also grants the [gold]Flashlight Set[/gold] effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_F:
Every [blue]3[/blue] Attack cards you play that cost at least [blue]1[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
This relic also grants the [gold]Flashlight Set[/gold] effect.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_FLA:
Every [blue]3[/blue] Attack cards you play that cost at least [blue]1[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
For every [blue]10[/blue] stacks of [gold]Eternal Starlight[/gold], your Attack cards deal [blue]1[/blue] extra damage.
This relic also grants the [gold]Flashlight Set[/gold] effect.
One burst to blind. One more to end it.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_S: At the end of your turn, if you have fewer than [blue]5[/blue] cards in hand, draw [blue]1[/blue] extra card next turn.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_BUF: Whenever an enemy attacks you with an attack intent, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold] and gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
Take the hit. Keep the margin.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_BIG: At the end of your turn, all players gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold] and heal [blue]1[/blue] HP.
A full bowl can carry a whole team.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_MED: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_MED: At the start of each turn, gain [blue]3[/blue] stacks of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_F: Whenever you cause a teammate to gain [gold]StarLight[/gold] or [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold], both you and that target gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_A: While you are at full HP, gain [blue]2[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Your Attack cards deal extra damage equal to your [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold] stacks.
Light in hand. Clean in cut.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_ART: While you are at full HP, gain [blue]4[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Your Attack cards deal extra damage equal to your [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold] stacks.
While you are at full HP, gain [blue]4[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red]. Your Skill cards deal extra damage equal to half your [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold] stacks.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_B: Your Attack cards deal [blue]2[/blue] extra damage and apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Mark[/gold] after dealing damage.
Line up the center. Let the rest follow.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_EAG: When your Attack cards deal damage, first apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Mark[/gold] to the target. That hit then deals extra damage equal to the target's [gold]Mark[/gold] stacks × [blue]2[/blue].

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_TAR:
Your Attack cards deal [blue]1[/blue] extra damage.
At the start of each turn, apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Mark[/gold] to a random enemy.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_GIA:
Whenever you take unblocked damage, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Giant Anchor[/gold].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dreamship[/gold] note.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_BOX:
At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Vigor[/power].
This relic also grants the [gold]Boxing Gloves Set[/gold] effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_B:
At combat start, gain [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red]. At the start of each turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Vigor[/power].
This relic also grants the [gold]Boxing Gloves Set[/gold] effect.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_BOX:

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_SPE: At combat start, gain [blue]1[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green]. Every [blue]12[/blue] floors climbed, gain [blue]1[/blue] [keyword:Flight] for your next floor choice.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_S: At combat start, gain [blue]1[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green]. Every [blue]9[/blue] floors climbed, gain [blue]1[/blue] [keyword:Flight] for your next floor choice.
A cleaner rhythm turns into cleaner movement.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_SPE: At combat start, gain [blue]2[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green]. Every [blue]6[/blue] floors climbed, gain [blue]1[/blue] [keyword:Flight] for your next floor choice.
The premium version starts moving before anyone else does.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_B: At combat start, your Max Energy is increased by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_EXT:
Cooldown-type Persona relics have their cooldown cap reduced by [blue]1[/blue].
[relic]Bionic Jasmine[/relic]'s step conversion requirement is reduced by [blue]1[/blue]/[blue]4[/blue].
One more bar of charge. One less turn of waiting.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_ELE: Whenever damage you take is fully blocked, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Elegant Feather[/gold], up to [blue]3[/blue].
Grace under pressure turns into force on the return.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_ATM: Whenever you cause another player to gain [gold]StarLight[/gold], that target gains [blue]1[/blue] extra [gold]StarLight[/gold], and you gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold].
Send one out. Hear one back.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_PURPLE_T:
Whenever you play a card that costs at least [blue]1[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold].
If your HP is full, spend [blue]4[/blue] stacks of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold] and gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
A little sugar. A little sustain.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_VIT: Whenever you draw [blue]1[/blue] card, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold]. This can trigger at most [blue]9[/blue] times each turn.
A steady supplement for a longer fight.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_MAR: After your Skill cards deal damage to an enemy, apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Mark[/gold] to that target.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_MAG: Once each turn, when a Skill card deals damage to a monster that already has [gold]Mark[/gold], apply [blue]1[/blue] more [gold]Mark[/gold] and return a copy of that Skill card to your hand.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_NIN:
At combat start, your Max Energy is increased by {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
Whenever your Skill cards deal damage to an enemy, that target takes extra damage equal to its [gold]Mark[/gold] stacks.
Marks are for finishing, not for decoration.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_BLUE_HAN: After you play a Persona Skill card, apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Mark[/gold] to a random enemy.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_HAN: After you play a Persona Skill card, draw [blue]1[/blue] card and apply [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Mark[/gold] to a random enemy.
A bigger gust keeps the turn moving.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_INI: At rest sites, you can spend Gold to [gold]Ascend[/gold]: the first [blue]3[/blue] uses cost [gold]60[/gold]/[gold]90[/gold]/[gold]120[/gold] Gold and let you choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] token relics, then heal [blue]15[/blue]% Max HP. After all [blue]3[/blue] ascensions are complete, the option only heals [blue]15[/blue]% Max HP.
A tiny anchor point for steadily compounding returns.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_EXCLUSIV: Trident

After you play a Persona Skill card, make [blue]1[/blue] player who does not already have [gold]Empowered Trident[/gold] gain it.
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dreamship[/gold] note.
The prow strikes first. The rest of the crew catches up later.
Dreamship Model

At combat start, gain [blue]2[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green].
Every [blue]15[/blue] cards you play, reduce Persona relic cooldown by [blue]1[/blue].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dreamship[/gold] note.
Only the hull is miniature. The route is not.
Cursed Sword

At combat start, gain [blue]99[/blue] [gold]Frail[/gold].
At the start of turn [blue]1[/blue] and every multiple of [blue]3[/blue], gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to this relic's counter.
Whenever you kill [blue]1[/blue] monster, this relic's counter +[blue]1[/blue].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Spirit Festival[/gold] note.
The curse stays. So does the swing.
Vengeance Halberd

If you have defense-loss debuffs, gain [blue]5[/blue] temporary [red]Strength[/red].
If you have HP-loss debuffs, gain [blue]5[/blue] temporary [green]Dexterity[/green].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Spirit Festival[/gold] note.
The worse the state, the cleaner the revenge.
Piercing Gun

Whenever your Skill cards deal damage, they also resolve the portion blocked by Block as extra damage, effectively stripping Block first.
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Spirit Festival[/gold] note.
It does not pierce armor. It refuses to acknowledge it.
Bronze Gong

After you play a Persona Skill card, all players gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Empowered Bronze Gong[/gold].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Water Town[/gold] note.
One strike for the whole team.
Zuo Tea Cake

At combat start, gain [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red].
After being obtained, during the current act, whenever your Attack card damages a non-Elite, non-Boss enemy, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Zuo Tea Cake[/gold].
It expires next act.
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Magic Academy[/gold] note.
Sweet enough to keep the lesson moving.
Ancient Wand

All Skill cards deal [blue]+3[/blue] damage.
At combat start, Max Energy +{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Magic Academy[/gold] note.
Old wood. Very direct answers.
Boutique Sword and Shield

At combat start, gain [blue]2[/blue] [red]Strength[/red].
At the start of each turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
In Boss rooms, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Problem Student[/gold] each turn.
While you have [gold]Problem Student[/gold], gain [blue]4[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Magic Academy[/gold] note.
Expensive gear, reckless confidence.
Storm Talisman

Whenever you play a Skill card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold].
Whenever you draw [blue]1[/blue] card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Half Life Heal[/gold].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dragon Palace[/gold] note.
The bigger the wave, the busier the charm.
Psychedelic Seafood Soup

At the start of each turn, randomly gain either [blue]1[/blue] or [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dragon Palace[/gold] note.
You never quite know which bowl you got.
Little Snake Doll

Whenever you take damage from enemies, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Reverse Scales[/gold].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dragon Palace[/gold] note.
Quiet toy. Sharp memory.
Little Carp Doll

After you play a Persona Skill card, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Counter[/gold].
Whenever any [gold]Counter[/gold] effect triggers, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [gold]Empowered Little Carp Doll[/gold], once each turn.
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dragon Palace[/gold] note.
Take one hit. Grow one scale.
Infinite Snake

At combat start, Max Energy +{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
At the start of each turn, if you have fewer than [blue]8[/blue] cards in hand, draw until you have [blue]8[/blue].
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dragon Palace[/gold] note.
The hand empties. The coil comes back.
Crossed Twin Carp

At the start of each turn, gain [gold]Empowered Crossed Twin Carp[/gold].
Whenever you gain [gold]Vigor[/gold], if you do not already have [gold]Empowered Crossed Twin Carp[/gold], gain it.
This relic also grants the [gold]Series: Dragon Palace[/gold] note.
They do not cross paths. They accelerate each other.
Candy Membership Card

At the start of each turn, if your hand does not contain [gold]Curious Candy Machine[/gold], add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Curious Candy Machine[/gold] to your hand.
This relic also grants the [gold]Ghost Alley Series[/gold] note.
The card proves the machine is always open for business.
Timer

Whenever you gain [gold]Modification[/gold], gain [blue]1[/blue] extra stack. For every [blue]2[/blue] stacks of [gold]Modification[/gold] you have, gain [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red].
This relic also grants the [gold]Ghost Alley Series[/gold] effect.
Every tick makes the price a little closer.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSONALITY_DE: No token abilities recorded yet
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_NINJA.d: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Ninjutsu Combo[/card] to your hand. At turn start, [power]Copy Count[/power] resets to [blue]0[/blue]. Each Skill card you play increases [power]Copy Count[/power] by [blue]1[/blue], up to a displayed maximum of [blue]9[/blue]. Whenever you play your [blue]3[/blue]rd, [blue]6[/blue]th, or [blue]9[/blue]th Skill card each turn, copy the most recently played non-persona Skill card into your hand and give it [exhaust]Exhaust[/exhaust]. The [blue]10[/blue]th Skill card and later no longer trigger this copy effect.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_NINJA.f: Every cut leaves room for one more trick.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSONALITY_DE: [Persona Derivative: Garrote]

Starts with [blue]1[/blue] stack. At combat start, gain [power]Esoteric Empower[/power] equal to this relic's stacks. Every [blue]6[/blue] Skill cards with current resolved cost [blue]1[/blue] or higher you play in combat reduce [relic]Persona: Ninja[/relic]'s cooldown by [blue]1[/blue]. Every [blue]9[/blue] Skill cards with current resolved cost [blue]1[/blue] or higher you play in combat permanently increase this relic's stacks by [blue]1[/blue].
The knot tightens a little more every time the sequence completes.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_TOKEN_GOLD_ARC: Once each turn, when you play your [blue]3[/blue]rd Skill card, copy that Skill card, give it [exhaust]Exhaust[/exhaust], add it to your hand, and make it free this turn. This relic shows how many Skill cards you have played toward that trigger this turn.
The third notation is where the spell starts repeating itself.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_ZHAO.de: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Invoke Spirits[/card] to your hand. At combat start, gain [power]Extra Attack[/power]. Whenever you or the current [power]Invoke Spirits[/power] target play Attack cards, accumulate their actual cost; every [blue]2[/blue] total cost grants [blue]1[/blue] [power]Foxfire[/power].
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_ZHAO.fl: When the spirit descends, every strike echoes twice.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_UNCLE_P: At the start of every 3rd turn, add 1 [card]Really Angry![/card] to your hand. At turn start, refresh [power]Node[/power] to a value from 1 to 6, then gain random swings of -2 to +2 temporary Strength, temporary Dexterity, Vigor, Block, and Energy. If Node is 6, your Attack cards are Unblockable this turn. If Node is 1, next turn's Node is forced to 6.
He never has a small reaction.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_FENG.de: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Channel Energy[/card] to your hand. At combat start, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Gathering Strength[/power]. If you played no Attack cards this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Gathering Strength[/power] at end of turn, or [blue]2[/blue] in Elite and Boss rooms. Whenever you play an Attack card, lose [blue]1[/blue] [power]Gathering Strength[/power]; if you had exactly [blue]5[/blue] beforehand, lose [blue]2[/blue] additional stacks and deal the same actual damage to all other enemies.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_FENG.fl: The calmer the preparation, the harder the release lands.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_DEITY_L: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Survey Finds[/power]. At combat start, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Living Folio[/card] to your hand. While [card]Living Folio[/card]'s permanent damage bonus is [blue]0-11[/blue], each consumed stack of [relic]Persona Derivative: Living Folio[/relic] permanently increases its base damage by [blue]1[/blue] and reduces its Energy cost by [blue]1[/blue]. While its permanent damage bonus is [blue]12-22[/blue], it gains [blue]1[/blue] permanent base damage for every [blue]2[/blue] stacks consumed. While its permanent damage bonus is [blue]23+[/blue], it gains [blue]1[/blue] permanent base damage for every [blue]3[/blue] stacks consumed.
Every page turned leaves the next clue sharper than the last.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_KAWAII_: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Cyber Angel[/card] to your hand. When an enemy attacks you and deals unblocked damage, it gains [blue]1[/blue] [power]Fan[/power]. When an enemy takes unblocked damage from you or [relic]Persona: Needy Girl[/relic], it gains [blue]1[/blue] [power]Fan[/power].
Attention from the far side of the screen can still become force in the real fight.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_NEEDY_G: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Emotional Overdose[/card] to your hand. At combat start, gain [blue]2[/blue] [power]Love[/power]. Whenever you or [relic]Persona: KAngel[/relic] take unblocked damage, gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Love[/power].
The more attention it gets, the more desperately it wants to be needed.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSONALITY_DE: [Persona Derivative: Ultimate Cutest Angel]

[card]Cyber Angel[/card]: If the total [power]Fan[/power] stacks among all enemies that have [power]Fan[/power] is above [blue]9[/blue], all enemies lose [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] and each other player gains [blue]3[/blue] [gold]StarLight[/gold]. This can trigger up to [blue]3[/blue] times each combat.
Once the stream overheats enough, even the battlefield starts buffering.
[Persona Derivative: Streamer Girl]

When you play [card]Emotional Overdose[/card], if you have at least [blue]4[/blue] [power]Love[/power], permanently gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP and permanently increase the [power]Love[/power] cap by [blue]1[/blue].
The more love piles up, the more the body wants to grow around it.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_PANDA_M: When obtained, gain Max HP equal to [blue]40[/blue]% of your current HP, rounded up, then heal that much. At combat start, lose [blue]1[/blue] [red]Strength[/red] and [blue]1[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green]. Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Big Eater[/card] to your hand. Whenever you gain [power]Regeneration[/power] or [power]Half Life Heal[/power] during combat, each other ally gains [blue]2[/blue] of the same power.
Eat first. Then make sure the whole team stays full.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSON_JUNK_BO: Every [blue]3[/blue]rd turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [card]Come Here, You[/card] to your hand. At the start of each act, mark [blue]16[/blue] combats. When you kill an enemy during a marked combat, reduce this relic's cooldown by [blue]2[/blue]. Every [blue]2[/blue] marked-combat kills, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack of [relic]Persona Derivative: Z3000 Weapon Frame[/relic].
If it looks like junk long enough, people stop expecting the artillery.
RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSONALITY_DE: [Persona Derivative: Panda Meng]

Whenever you eat [card]Chocolate Cake[/card] or [card]Hamburger[/card], gain [blue]1[/blue] [power]Counter[/power]. If it was [card]Hamburger[/card], permanently gain [blue]2[/blue] Max HP and heal [blue]2[/blue]. Whenever a relic grants you Max HP, gain an additional [blue]40[/blue]% of that amount, rounded up. Your [power]Counter[/power] deals bonus damage equal to the sum of all current enemy attack intents.
A bigger appetite makes for a meaner answer back.
[Persona Derivative: Z3000 Weapon Frame]

Starts at [blue]0[/blue] stacks. At combat start, gain [red]Strength[/red] equal to this relic's stacks. While this relic has more than [blue]6[/blue] stacks, whenever one of your Attack cards deals unblocked damage to an enemy, that enemy loses [blue]1[/blue] [green]Dexterity[/green].
Once the frame is stable, the rest is just mounting heavier parts.
[Persona Derivative: Living Folio]

Starts with [blue]1[/blue] stack and caps at [blue]9[/blue]. Whenever you enter an Event room, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Whenever you play an Event card, gain [blue]1[/blue] stack; [card]Trouble Maker[/card] does not count.

Open first. Pretend luck was guaranteed later.

A middle-tier bet with respectable upside.

When picked up, choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]3[/blue] token relics that are not part of any series. Each option rolls independently with Blue/Purple/Gold odds of [blue]20[/blue]%/[blue]50[/blue]%/[blue]30[/blue]%.
The better the pack, the shakier the hands.

RE_ASTRAL_PARTY_MOD_RELIC_PERSONALITY_DE: [Persona Derivative: Fortune and Mischance]

Starts at [blue]0[/blue] and caps at [blue]9[/blue] stacks. Whenever the ones digit of your total floor is [blue]1[/blue] or [blue]6[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Whenever [relic]Persona: Feng Shui[/relic]'s [power]Node[/power] rolls [blue]6[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] stack. Whenever [relic]Persona: Feng[/relic] plays [card]Channel Energy[/card], gain [blue]1[/blue] stack.
Luck and trouble always travel as a pair.
